_comment: Shared oracle for RateGuard EstimateTokens/estimateTokens/estimate_tokens. CJK code points count ~1 token each; all other characters ~4 chars/token (rounded up). Go/Node/Python must all reproduce expected_tokens exactly. Iterate by CODE POINT (not byte/UTF-16 unit). Generated from the Python reference implementation in packages/sdk-python/rateguard/core/tokenizer.py.

vectors.name: ascii_sentence
vectors.text: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.

vectors.name: chinese_sentence
vectors.text: 人工智能正在改变世界
